title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
